"'''I, Jensaarai'''" is an article published in ''[[Polyhedron 157]]'', written by [[Rodney Thompson]] and illustrated by [[Ramón Pérez]]. The article collected and expanded upon information on the [[Jensaarai/Legends|Jensaarai]] sect.

{{Magazine-stub|article}}
